text: When we started Harlem Capital, we didn't just want to invest in startups.
We wanted to change who gets to win.
Seven years later, Harlem Capital manages a quarter billion dollars,
has invested in 70 companies, and has nearly one million followers on social media.
We back founders who are charting their own course and changing the world.
The next decade of innovation belongs to voters who aren't afraid of their arena.
Many have been there before. They're not experimenting, they're executing.
As they level up, so do we.
We built more than a firm. We created a category and are evolving the ecosystem that fuels it.
A community that multiplies opportunity and compounds value.
At Harlem Capital, we don't chase trends. We bet on winners.
If you're a winner, come build with us.
Wherever they come from, however they look, whatever path they took.
Because when a bar is excellence, all winners are welcome.
